# EMR Play

> EMR Play is an emotional learning platform where children and parents grow together through fun activities, mood tracking, journaling, and guided games.

EMR Play offers age-appropriate emotion exploration for kids (5–16) and reflective parenting tools for caregivers, including role-play, quizzes, and guides.

## Pages

- [Welcome](/welcome): Overview of EMR Play and how children and parents use it.
- [Parent sign up](/parent/signup): Create a parent account to support a child's emotional growth.
- [Parent sign in](/parent/login): Sign in to the parent experience.
- [Child sign up](/child/signup): Create a child account linked to a parent.
- [Child sign in](/child/login): Sign in to the child experience.
